text:
No
Reasoning: The patient's current hospital visit record contains several significant diagnoses, including Alcoholic cirrhosis of liver, Portal vein thrombosis, Esophageal varices in diseases classified elsewhere, with bleeding, Other ascites, Urinary tract infection, site not specified, Acute kidney failure, unspecified, Unspecified protein-calorie malnutrition, Portal hypertension, Streptococcus infection in conditions classified elsewhere and of unspecified site, streptococcus, group D [Enterococcus], Other specified disorders of stomach and duodenum, Hypoxemia, Unspecified essential hypertension, Other specified retention of urine, Spinal stenosis in cervical region, and Personal history of malignant neoplasm of rectum, rectosigmoid junction, and anus. The patient is also receiving various supportive medications such as Albumin 25%, Ondansetron, Sarna Lotion, Potassium Chloride, CeftriaXONE, Iso-Osmotic Dextrose, Furosemide, Nadolol, OxycoDONE (Immediate Release), Pantoprazole, NS, Cephalexin, Lactulose, Magnesium Oxide, Sucralfate, SW, Magnesium Sulfate, Spironolactone, D5W, Vial, Pantoprazole Sodium, Octreotide Acetate, Rifaximin, Multivitamins, Senna, Docusate Sodium.
